captions.formal: A time-lapse captures vehicles traveling along a multi-lane urban street lined with autumn trees and high-rise buildings.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another time-lapse of cars inching forward while autumn trees silently judge everyone.
captions.humorous_tech: The city's traffic threads run on a tight loop with zero garbage collection in sight.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Watching rush hour traffic is like watching everyone collectively forget where they parked.

captions.formal: A ginger kitten walks forward through green foliage and branches toward the camera on a dirt path.
captions.sarcastic: Oh sure, just stroll through the bushes like you own the place, tiny orange explorer.
captions.humorous_tech: This kitten is clearly running a recursive depth-first search through the foliage.
captions.humorous_non_tech: When you finally find the snack your sibling hid in the bushes.

captions.formal: A professional woman works diligently at her computer workstation in a modern office environment, demonstrating focused concentration as she types.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another day, another spreadsheet pretending to be 'meaningful work' while the office plants silently judge us all.
captions.humorous_tech: When the Wi-Fi is stable but your motivation isn't: a real-time demonstration of typing while your soul buffers.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She's typing so intensely, even the office plants are leaning in to read what she's writing.

captions.formal: An aerial camera tracks over a forested mountain range featuring rocky peaks and a distant hazy city.
captions.sarcastic: Oh wonderful, mountains so remote even the rocks outnumber every human by a billion to zero.
captions.humorous_tech: These rocky peaks look like legacy code, ancient, untouched, and nobody dares deploy to production.
captions.humorous_non_tech: These mountains are like my Monday morning, rocky, green, and way too far from coffee.

captions.formal: A tranquil coastal landscape featuring ocean waves rhythmically rolling onto a pebbly beach, framed by a verdant cliff rising majestically.
captions.humorous_tech: The ocean's wave function has been successfully compiled and deployed to the shoreline, with no crashes detected in the foam.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The ocean keeps sending waves like emails you forgot to unsubscribe from — they just keep coming and coming.

captions.formal: Pedestrians and vehicles navigate a busy urban intersection beneath large buildings displaying advertisements and Japanese signage.
captions.sarcastic: Pedestrians play human Frogger while buses casually cut through the chaos like they own the place.
captions.humorous_tech: This intersection runs like a multithreaded system with zero mutex locks and pedestrians as unsynchronized threads.
captions.humorous_non_tech: It's like the world's biggest game of red light green light except nobody ever actually stops.

captions.formal: A person in a striped apron transfers diced zucchini from a knife onto a wooden cutting board.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, another chef showing off their knife-balancing zucchini trick like it's a culinary magic show.
captions.humorous_tech: This chef runs a manual data migration, transferring diced zucchini from knife array to cutting board database.
captions.humorous_non_tech: My knife doubles as a serving spoon because apparently I can't be bothered to buy a spatula.

captions.formal: A lone athlete sprints across a marked running track at an outdoor stadium, passing lane numbers one through seven before.
captions.sarcastic: Oh look, someone finally decided to use those seven perfectly good lanes — and only for about three seconds.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The track was lonely, then a guy showed up for a quick cameo, and now the track is lonely again.
